headline: Principal Financial Group (PFG) Stock Looks Overvalued on Current Earnings Expectations
summary: After a strong multi year run, with Principal Financial Group stock up 107.2% over the last five years, the current checks indicate the shares lean expensive rather than clearly cheap. Over five years, a 107.2% total return suggests Principal Financial Group has already delivered substantial gains for long term holders, which can limit the margin of safety at today’s price. The company’s recent disclosure of US$808b in assets under management highlights the scale that may support earnings...
